scripts.lint: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=['app/page.tsx','app/budget/[jobId]/page.tsx','lib/api.ts'];for(const f of files){if(!fs.existsSync(f)){console.error('Missing file:',f);process.exit(1)}};const api=fs.readFileSync('lib/api.ts','utf8');if(!api.includes('export const API_BASE_URL')){console.error('Missing API_BASE_URL export');process.exit(1)};console.log('web lint ok');"
scripts.test:e2e: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.readFileSync('app/page.tsx','utf8');const checks=['创建任务','选择并上传视频'];for(const c of checks){if(!s.includes(c)){console.error('Missing UI text:',c);process.exit(1)}};console.log('web smoke ok');"
